name: BB:Audit Tools Access
notes: Edit this building block to define events that are related access of information systems audit tools.
bb_references: BB:Audit Tools Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log, Universal DSM
when any of Object Name (custom) are contained in any of Audit Tools - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY BB:Audit Tools Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log, Universal DSM
AND when any of Object Name (custom) are contained in any of Audit Tools - AlphaNumeric
